MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Chuck Geerhart, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Kimberly Villegas.
Attorney Kaquishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tracy Buchanan is present.
Attorney Michael Spalding appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of November 13, 2017 is vacated. (501)
